title: Turn to the Right
writer: Jack E. Hazzard, June Mathis, Mary O'Hara
actors: Alice Terry, Jack Mulhall, Harry Myers
plot: Joe Bascom, only son of a widow, lives in a Connecticut village. He loves Elsie Tillinger, daughter of the deacon, the wealthiest man in town; but the deacon forbids Joe to speak to her. Joe leaves home to make his way in the worl...
